package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for request_dto_outside_transport_package: Request binding structs that live in repositories or service packages instead of transport-facing packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule141NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule141NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule141NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario141Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule141NegativeService, input Rule141NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
